description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Installer that runs on pushes to master, main, develop, and actions_installer branches, as well as tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master, main, and develop branches. In a single windows-latest job, check out the repository with submodules, install Python dependencies, extract the CoolProp version from CMakeLists.txt, configure CMake with the Release build type, build the Windows installer, and archive the installer artifacts.
